2605.17877.title: PAIR: Prefix-Aware Internal Reward Model for Multi-Turn Agent Optimization
2605.17877.paper_summary: A significant hurdle for current LLMs is the execution of complex, multi-stage tasks. Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) has been emerging as a leading choice, but its reliance on sparse outcome rewards severely limits credit assignment across intermediate steps. Existing remedies such as running full rollouts to assign step-level advantages, calling external LLM judges at each step, or computing intrinsic rewards that require ground-truth answers at every evaluation introduce significant costs or practical constraints. We hypothesize that internal correctness probing over LLM hidden states can be repurposed as a step-level reward signal, potentially addressing all of these limitations at once. However, existing probing research assumes clean inputs, and we first show that this assumption breaks down in multi-step settings: hidden-state probes degrade severely under prefix contamination tracking coherence with the (possibly corrupted) prefix rather than grounded correctness, while attention-based features remain robust to contamination but underperform on clean prefixes. Building on this complementary relationship, we propose the Prefix-Aware Internal Reward (PAIR), a two-stage model with a frozen hidden-state probe estimating belief-consistency and a lightweight attention-based head correcting it toward grounded correctness. Experimental results show that PAIR achieves the highest AUROC on contaminated trajectories while operating at negligible inference cost, enabling dense step-level reward signals for GRPO training without external model calls, ground-truth dependencies, or full-trajectory rollouts.
2605.17877.paper_summary_zh: 一個當前大型語言模型（LLMs）面臨的重要障礙是執行複雜的多階段任務。群體相對政策優化（GRPO）逐漸成為一個主要選擇，但其對稀疏結果獎勵的依賴嚴重限制了在中間步驟之間的信用分配。現有的解決方案，例如進行完整的回合以分配步驟級優勢、在每一步調用外部 LLM 評估者，或計算需要每次評估的真實答案的內在獎勵，均引入了顯著的成本或實際限制。我們假設對 LLM 隱藏狀態的內部正確性探測可以重新用作步驟級獎勵信號，可能同時解決這些限制。然而，現有的探測研究假設輸入是乾淨的，我們首先展示這一假設在多步驟設置中失效：隱藏狀態探測在前綴污染下嚴重退化，追蹤與（可能已損壞的）前綴的一致性，而不是基於真實的正確性，儘管基於注意力的特徵對污染保持穩健，但在乾淨前綴上表現不佳。在這種互補關係的基礎上，我們提出了前綴感知內部獎勵（PAIR），這是一個兩階段模型，具有一個凍結的隱藏狀態探測器來估計信念一致性，以及一個輕量級的基於注意力的頭部來修正其朝向基於真實的正確性。實驗結果顯示，PAIR 在污染軌跡上達到最高的 AUROC，同時運行時推理成本微不足道，使得 GRPO 訓練能夠在不需要外部模型調用、真實依賴或完整軌跡回合的情況下實現密集的步驟級獎勵信號。
2605.17877.author: Wonjoong Kim et.al.
2605.17877.authors: Wonjoong Kim, Yeonjun In, Sangwu Park, Dongha Lee, Chanyoung Park
